name: candalena-claw
description: Candalena Claw — Standalone LMS Reminder Engine v5.0. Multi-channel notifications (Telegram/WhatsApp), interactive bot commands, dynamic message templates, admin error alerting, web dashboard, CLI wizard & background daemon with multi-DB support (MySQL/PostgreSQL/MongoDB).

scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');const src=p.join('src','dashboard','views');const dst=p.join('dist','dashboard','views');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(src).forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(p.join(src,f),p.join(dst,f)));console.log('Copied dashboard views to dist.')}" && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='dist/cli/index.js';const c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(!c.startsWith('#!')){fs.writeFileSync(p,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c);}"
